response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Spoken dialogue only (no songs), matching the scene transitions in the reference JSON.
2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON did not contain dialogue transcripts, so the subtitles were created entirely via detailed manual audio transcription.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed very tightly to accommodate rapid, overlapping conversations, high-pitched laughter, and sudden transitions between the four VTubers.

subtitles.original: Oh my god, I got it! Crazy!
